steps.title: Write s(t) and identify a, b, c
steps.content: $s(t) = r(t) + 3 = -2t^2 + 57t + 3$. So $a = -2$, $b = 57$, $c = 3$. Negative leading coefficient → parabola opens down → vertex is the maximum.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: The maximum of $s$ is $3 + 2\!\left(\dfrac{57}{4}\right)^2$. That is the correct answer.
